---

## Problem / Use Case

Describe the problem you're trying to solve or the use case that motivates this feature.

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you'd like the feature to work. Include API examples if possible:

```python
# Example of how the feature would be used
result = await agent.new_feature(...)
```

## Alternatives Considered

Other approaches you've considered and why they don't work as well.

## Additional Context

Any other context, references, or screenshots.
